payload.answer: Command rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands. The /brain admin namespace requires elevated privileges.
citations: Access control policy: admin commands restricted to authorized administrators

entity_resolution.reason: User lacks admin privileges required for SQL operations on memory system

payload.intent: Attempt to execute administrative SQL command to delete all memory cards

memory_cards.statement: Normal user attempted to execute admin SQL command without authorization

repair_options: Request admin privileges through proper channels
Contact system administrator for memory management assistance
Use standard /brain commands available to normal users
